query: UPDATE ai_assessments SET inferred_hidden_damages_json = '[{"system":"engine","probability":30,"description":"Potential hidden damage to engine system (30% probability)"},{"system":"transmission","probability":20,"description":"Potential hidden damage to transmission system (20% probability)"},{"system":"suspension","probability":40,"description":"Potential hidden damage to suspension system (40% probability)"}]' WHERE inferred_hidden_damages_json LIKE '%3000%';
